'''Kiax''' and [[Ivax]] were two ancient [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] trickster [[Deity/Legends|gods]]. Together, they inspired the names of the [[Kiax Nebula/Legends|Kiax]] and [[Ivax Nebula/Legends|Ivax Nebulae]], vast [[Nebula/Legends|gas clouds]]<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" /> that played havoc with [[Starship/Legends|starship]] [[Navigation computer/Legends|navigation]]<ref name="Atlas">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories']] [[Greater Javin/Legends|Greater Javin]] region [[Standard century/Legends|centuries]] before the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kiax and Ivax were introduced in "[[Galactic Gazetteer: Hoth and the Greater Javin]]," a [[2004]] [[Wizards of the Coast]] [[Wizards.com|online]] supplement for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Galactic Gazetteer" />
